summary: Iteration 52 - Product Images & Brand Data Toggle Feature Testing. All 9 features tested successfully. Logo upload removed from AssetUploader, replaced with two-column layout (Exact Photos + Reference). Brand Data Toggle appears when company selected, shows company data, is checked by default, and toggles properly with hint text appearing when ON.

FEATURE_1_logo_upload_removed.details: Logo upload button (upload-logo-btn) no longer exists in AssetUploader component. Logo is now handled via company data.

FEATURE_2_asset_uploader_two_columns.details: AssetUploader now has two columns: 'Exact Photos' (green #10B981, Eye icon) and 'Reference' (blue #7CB9E8, Image icon). Colors verified via computed styles.

FEATURE_3_exact_photos_upload.details: Exact Photos upload button exists with Eye icon and green color (#10B981 = rgb(16, 185, 129)). Files uploaded get type='exact'.

FEATURE_4_reference_photos_upload.details: Reference Photos upload button exists with Image icon and blue color (#7CB9E8 = rgb(124, 185, 232)). Files uploaded get type='reference'.

FEATURE_5_brand_toggle_appears.details: Brand Data Toggle appears when company is selected. Shows checkbox, company logo, name (AgentZZ Test Co), phone/WA indicator, website URL, and 'BRAND' label.

FEATURE_6_brand_toggle_default_on.details: Brand toggle is checked (ON) by default. Toggle button has gold highlight (class includes C9A84C) when checked.

FEATURE_7_brand_toggle_click.details: Clicking toggle changes applyBrandData state. Verified: Initial=ON (gold highlight), After 1st click=OFF (no gold), After 2nd click=ON (gold restored).

FEATURE_8_brand_hint_text.details: Hint text 'Logo and company data will be applied to videos and campaign texts' appears when brand toggle is ON, disappears when OFF.

FEATURE_9_contact_data_removed.details: All Contact Data section elements removed. None of the contact-* testids found.

FEATURE_10_saved_logos_removed.details: Saved Logos section no longer exists in the UI.

FEATURE_11_exact_photos_hint.details: Exact photos hint text key exists (studio.exact_photos_hint = 'AI will use this exact product with professional editing and treatment'). Hint appears when exact photos are uploaded.

seed_data_creation: Company seeded via localStorage (key: agentzz_companies) with id='co_test_1', name='AgentZZ Test Co', phone='+5511999887766', is_whatsapp=true, website_url='https://agentzz.com', logo_url='placeholder', is_primary=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52: All Product Images & Brand Toggle features verified working. Route: /marketing/studio. Key data-testids: brand-data-toggle, brand-data-btn, upload-exact-btn, upload-ref-btn, asset-uploader. Brand toggle uses applyBrandData state (default true). Toggle shows company logo, name, phone/website when activeCompany is set. Exact photos have green color (#10B981), Reference has blue (#7CB9E8). Contact Data section and Saved Logos section have been removed. Previous iterations: 50 (avatar edit), 51 (angle regen).

mocked_apis.note: File upload goes to real /api/campaigns/pipeline/upload endpoint. Company data stored in localStorage.
